prestazioni: Crankshaft reinforcement with a billet steel 4.0T C8 (DDH) stroker crank from VAC Motorsports, increasing displacement to 4.2L while maintaining OEM-grade balancing for the C7A EA825 4.0L V8 TFSI engine

Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and custom 0.82 A/R turbine housings, paired with a full titanium 4-inch Tial MV-R wastegate system and 3.5-inch V-band downpipes from IPE Performance

Full fuel system overhaul featuring a Radium Engineering dual-pump surge tank, dual Bosch Motorsports 044 high-flow fuel pumps, and Injector Dynamics ID2600X injectors, controlled via a Syvecs S12 ECU with flex-fuel ethanol mapping and individual cylinder knock control
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Liberty Walk LB-RS6 GT Avant kit, including extended fenders, custom side skirts, and a 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets from Akrapović

OEM+ carbon fiber interior with a full Alcantara headliner, Recaro Pole Position seats in Nappa leather with RS6 GT-specific embroidery, and a custom 3D-printed titanium shift knob from 034Motorsport for the ZF 8HP95X transmission

Aggressive aero package featuring a 3D carbon fiber front splitter from Vorsteiner with integrated canards, a fixed carbon fiber GT3-style rear wing from APR Performance with adjustable angle of attack, and a custom titanium underbody diffuser from AWE Tuning with active air curtains
